query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS peer_feedback (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  reviewId INT NOT NULL,
  requesterId INT NOT NULL,
  responderId INT,
  responderName VARCHAR(255),
  responderEmail VARCHAR(320),
  relationship ENUM('peer', 'direct_report', 'manager', 'cross_functional', 'external') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'submitted', 'declined') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  communicationRating INT,
  teamworkRating INT,
  leadershipRating INT,
  technicalRating INT,
  problemSolvingRating INT,
  strengths TEXT,
  areasForImprovement TEXT,
  additionalComments TEXT,
  isAnonymous BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  requestedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  submittedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS feedback_requests (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  reviewId INT NOT NULL,
  requesterId INT NOT NULL,
  requesterName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  employeeName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  dueDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  remindersSent INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  lastReminderAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  totalRequested INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalSubmitted INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('open', 'closed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'open' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS feedback_requests (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  reviewId INT NOT NULL,
  requesterId INT NOT NULL,
  requesterName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  employeeName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  dueDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  remindersSent INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,

  totalRequested INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalSubmitted INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('open', 'closed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'open' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
